name: monogram-graphguided
desc: monogram (cli) — SAME binary + index as `monogram`, ONLY the skill-discover guidance differs. Adds the 'lexical≠causal / follow-the-graph' principle (don't anchor on the top lexical hit; from each candidate run chain --callers/--callees --depth 2; use the code's real tokens). Experiment arm for MONOGRAM-GUIDANCE-INTERVENTION: does guidance alone close monogram's UAF deficit vs `monogram` (default) without a code change? Control = `monogram`.
